CONTENT.Club career: Henin is a youth product of FC Montrouge, Clairefontaine and Monaco. He began his senior career with the reserves of Monaco in 2017, playing 2 seasons with them. Released in the summer of 2019, he transferred to the Moroccan club Wydad on 15 January 2020. He made his senior and professional debut with Wydad in a 1–0 CAF Champions League win over Petro de Luanda on 23 February 2021.
CONTENT.Personal life: Henin was born in Paris, France. He holds French and Moroccan nationalities.Outside of football, Henin pursued a masters in Business and Engineering from the Moroccan university ISGA.
CONTENT.External links: Yanis Henin at SoccerwayYanis Henin at BDFutbol
CONTENT.International career: Henin is a youth international for Morocco, having played up to the Morocco U23s.

SUMMARY: Yanis Henin (Arabic: يانيس هينين; born 24 June 1999) is a French and Moroccan professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Wydad. He is a youth international for Morocco.
